evidence.description: xcodebuild -project WhatIfInvest.xcodeproj -scheme WhatIfInvest -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build succeeded.
AssetBadgeView uses SwiftUI Circle, LinearGradient, asset.tint, asset.symbol, and accessibility labels; it has no image or official-logo dependency.

leaf_updates.notes: Created compact, standard, and hero circular SwiftUI badge sizes with scaled ticker text.

evidence.description: The WhatIfInvest app target built successfully after ExploreView and TimelineChartCard integration.
Simulator screenshot shows the selected VOO badge in the scenario picker and the result summary card.

leaf_updates.notes: Replaced comparison and timeline legend markers with AssetBadgeView and kept the menu Picker while adding a visible selected asset badge beside it.

evidence.description: ShareCardExporterTests.testExportCreatesPNGFile passed, exercising ShareCardView rendering to PNG.
The app target built successfully with hero and standard badge usage in ShareCardView.

leaf_updates.notes: Added a hero badge in the primary share-card asset area and standard badges in comparison rows while preserving existing metric hierarchy.

evidence.description: xcodebuild test -project WhatIfInvest.xcodeproj -scheme WhatIfInvest -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' succeeded.
Repository search found no newly added official logo PNGs or bundled image assets; existing PNG references are share-card export output only.
Visual inspection of the simulator screenshot confirmed compact and standard VOO badges render without clipping.
